ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload.IDOC.E1WPBB01.E1WPBB02 map (item) -> { "IDTARIFAV": vars.IDTARIFAV, "CODARTICULO": item.MAT_NR as Number, "TALLA": ".", "COLOR": ".", "PBRUTO2": item.Z1WPBB02.KOND_VAL as Number, "DTO2": item.Z1WPBB02.KOND_PER as Number, "PNETO2": if ((item.Z1WPBB02.KOND_PER as Number) > 0) (item.Z1WPBB02.KOND_VAL as Number) * (1 - ((item.Z1WPBB02.KOND_PER as Number) / 100)) else item.Z1WPBB02.KOND_VAL as Number, "DESDE2": payload.IDOC.E1WPBB01.E1WPBB05.START_DATE as String {format: "yyyyMMdd"}, "HASTA2": payload.IDOC.E1WPBB01.E1WPBB05.END_DATE as String {format: "yyyyMMdd"} }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "IDTARIFAV": vars.IDTARIFAV, "CODARTICULO": payload.IDOC.E1WPBB01.E1WPBB02.MAT_NR as Number, "TALLA": ".", "COLOR": ".", "PBRUTO2": payload.IDOC.E1WPBB01.E1WPBB02.Z1WPBB02.KOND_VAL as Number, "DTO2": payload.IDOC.E1WPBB01.E1WPBB02.Z1WPBB02.KOND_PER as Number, "PNETO2": if ((payload.IDOC.E1WPBB01.E1WPBB02.Z1WPBB02.KOND_PER as Number) > 0) (payload.IDOC.E1WPBB01.E1WPBB02.Z1WPBB02.KOND_VAL as Number) * (1 - ((payload.IDOC.E1WPBB01.E1WPBB02.Z1WPBB02.KOND_PER as Number) / 100)) else payload.IDOC.E1WPBB01.E1WPBB02.Z1WPBB02.KOND_VAL as Number, "DESDE2": payload.IDOC.E1WPBB01.E1WPBB05.START_DATE as String {format: "yyyyMMdd"}, "HASTA2": payload.IDOC.E1WPBB01.E1WPBB05.END_DATE as String {format: "yyyyMMdd"} }

%dw 2.0 output application/json var prevPBRUTO = if (vars.PBRUTO != null and vars.PBRUTO is Array and vars.index > 0 and vars.PBRUTO[(vars.index - 1) as Number]? != null) vars.PBRUTO[(vars.index - 1) as Number].PBRUTO as Number else 0 --- { "IDTARIFAV": vars.IDTARIFAV, "CODARTICULO": payload.MAT_NR as Number, "TALLA": ".", "COLOR": ".", "DTOTEXTO2": vars.originalPayload.IDOC.E1WPBB01.BBY_NR, "PBRUTO": prevPBRUTO, "PBRUTO2": payload.Z1WPBB02.KOND_VAL as Number, "DTO2": payload.Z1WPBB02.KOND_PER as Number, "PNETO2": if ((payload.Z1WPBB02.KOND_PER as Number) > 0) ((prevPBRUTO - (prevPBRUTO * (payload.Z1WPBB02.KOND_PER as Number) / 100)) as String {format: "#0.000"}) else (payload.Z1WPBB02.KOND_VAL as Number) as String {format: "#0.000"}, "DESDE2": vars.originalPayload.IDOC.E1WPBB01.E1WPBB05.START_DATE as String {format: "yyyyMMdd"}, "HASTA2": vars.originalPayload.IDOC.E1WPBB01.E1WPBB05.END_DATE as String {format: "yyyyMMdd"} }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "IDTARIFAV": vars.IDTARIFAV, "CODARTICULO": payload.IDOC.E1WPBB01.E1WPBB02.MAT_NR as Number, "TALLA": ".", "COLOR": ".", "DTOTEXTO2": payload.IDOC.E1WPBB01.BBY_NR, "PBRUTO": vars.PBRUTO[0].PBRUTO as Number, "PBRUTO2": payload.IDOC.E1WPBB01.E1WPBB02.Z1WPBB02.KOND_VAL as Number, "DTO2": payload.IDOC.E1WPBB01.E1WPBB02.Z1WPBB02.KOND_PER as Number, "PNETO2": if ((payload.IDOC.E1WPBB01.E1WPBB02.Z1WPBB02.KOND_PER as Number) > 0) ((vars.PBRUTO[0].PBRUTO as Number) - ((vars.PBRUTO[0].PBRUTO as Number) * (payload.IDOC.E1WPBB01.E1WPBB02.Z1WPBB02.KOND_PER as Number) / 100)) as String {format: "#0.000"} else (payload.IDOC.E1WPBB01.E1WPBB02.Z1WPBB02.KOND_VAL as Number) as String {format: "#0.000"}, "DESDE2": payload.IDOC.E1WPBB01.E1WPBB05.START_DATE as String {format: "yyyyMMdd"}, "HASTA2": payload.IDOC.E1WPBB01.E1WPBB05.END_DATE as String {format: "yyyyMMdd"} }
